retry_reason: Not a wrapper – the function's purpose is command submission, not refcount management.

judge.reason: The primary purpose is to construct and send a WMI vdev up command to firmware, not to manage reference counts. The only refcount operation (dev_kfree_skb) is a cleanup step on the error path, not the main purpose of the function. No critical reference-counted object is passed to the caller.
